title: Esra Erğun Keşli, Ph.D.

Higher Education Council Formatted CV

Rate Us

Short CV

Lecturer Esra Ergun was born in 1988 in Mersin.She went to primary , middle and high school in Mersin. She studied physiotherapy and rehabiliation in Mugla University between 2007 and 2011. After she gratuated from University, she worked in private hospitals from 2011 until 2015. She works as a lecturer of orthopedic prostheses and orthotic in a Uskudar University.
